TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_makatapal_hakya_tu_nabalucu‚Äôan, title = makatapal_hakya_tu_nabalucu‚Äôan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/makatapal_hakya_tu_nabalucu‚Äôan} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == makatapal hakya tu nabalucu'an. matineng hakiya tu nadipaan nu misu,akay namakatengi tu hakiya kuheni tina kungku, makatapal hakiya tu nabalucu'an. . nu amilika asulit kuyni isasaay. lt's a human sign , When things go wrong When the scent of her lingers , And temptation's strong , lnto the boundary , Of each married man Sweet drceit comes calling , And negativity lands Cold cold heart , Hard done by you Some things look bettet baby , just asimple word lt's two hearts living , ln tow separate worlds But it's no sacrifice , no sacrifice lt's no sacrifice at all , Mutual misunderstanding After the fact , Welose direction No stone untumed , No tears to damn you Cold cold heart , Hard done by you Some things look better baby , Just passin' through And it's no sacrifice , Just a simple wort it's two separate worlds , But, lt'd no sacrifice No sacrifice, at all , No sacrifice at sll nilaculan Sakidaya a kamu u bacu nu tademaw kuyni. yu patelac ku kawaw sa. yu masaliyut ku bangisi sa icelang ku saala micumud tu tapiingan usiacaway tu naming a tatama sicedamay a sapiyala iniw tu makudi'ay a lala sacueded sa kubalucu'' mangelu' tu kisu haw ucacanan adihan mahida ubudawan madayumay a sasakamuen tusaay a balucu' maudip henay tusaay a kitakit caay kalecad cay kaw ni palawpes kuyni inayay ku nipalawpes naynayi kuni palawpes masasu patelac nadikuda sa kapahay a nutudu' saicelang sa nayay kulusa sapi tima' cuedetay a balucu' mangelu' tu kisu ucacanan adihan mahida ubudawan micaliway acacay cay kaw ni palawpes kuyni usadawmiay a cacay nu amiku tusaay a kitakit caay kalecad nika cacay kaku kapalawpes naynayi ku sapalawpes adidiaca naynayi ku sapalawpes namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natidengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == makatapar~…ĺ ńßakja tu nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an. matin…ôŇč ńßakija tu nadipaan nu misu,akaj namakat…ôŇči tu ńßakija kuńß…ôni tina kuŇčku, makatapar~…ĺ ńßakija tu nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an. . nu amir~…ĺika asur~…ĺit kujni isasaaj. r~…ĺt Ē~ °s a ńßuman sign , wńß…ôn tńßiŇčs go wroŇč wńß…ôn tńß…ô s ¶…ônt of ńß…ôr r~…ĺiŇč…ôrs , and t…ômptation Ē~ °s stroŇč , r~…ĺnto tńß…ô boundarj , of …ôa ¶ńß marri…ôd man sw…ô…ôt dr ¶…ôit ¶om…ôs ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺiŇč , and n…ôgati*itj r~…ĺands ¶or~…ĺd ¶or~…ĺd ńß…ôart , ńßard don…ô bj jou som…ô tńßiŇčs r~…ĺook b…ôtt…ôt babj , just asimpr~…ĺ…ô word r~…ĺt Ē~ °s two ńß…ôarts r~…ĺi*iŇč , r~…ĺn tow s…ôparat…ô worr~…ĺds but it Ē~ °s no sa ¶rifi ¶…ô , no sa ¶rifi ¶…ô r~…ĺt Ē~ °s no sa ¶rifi ¶…ô at ar~…ĺr~…ĺ , mutuar~…ĺ misund…ôrstandiŇč aft…ôr tńß…ô fa ¶t , w…ôr~…ĺos…ô dir…ô ¶tion no ston…ô untum…ôd , no t…ôars to damn jou ¶or~…ĺd ¶or~…ĺd ńß…ôart , ńßard don…ô bj jou som…ô tńßiŇčs r~…ĺook b…ôtt…ôr babj , *ust passin Ē~ ° tńßrougńß and it Ē~ °s no sa ¶rifi ¶…ô , *ust a simpr~…ĺ…ô wort it Ē~ °s two s…ôparat…ô worr~…ĺds , but, r~…ĺt Ē~ °d no sa ¶rifi ¶…ô no sa ¶rifi ¶…ô, at ar~…ĺr~…ĺ , no sa ¶rifi ¶…ô at sr~…ĺr~…ĺ nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan sakidaja a kamu u ba ¶u nu tad…ômaw kujni. ju pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku kawaw sa. ju masar~…ĺijut ku baŇčisi sa i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku saar~…ĺa mi ¶umud tu tapiiŇčan usia ¶awaj tu namiŇč a tatama si ¶…ôdamaj a sapijar~…ĺa iniw tu makudi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa sa ¶u…ôd…ôd sa kubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° Ē~ ° maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu kisu ńßaw u ¶a ¶anan adińßan mańßida ubudawan madajumaj a sasakamu…ôn tusaaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° maudip ńß…ônaj tusaaj a kitakit ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ¶aj kaw ni par~…ĺawp…ôs kujni inajaj ku nipar~…ĺawp…ôs najnaji kuni par~…ĺawp…ôs masasu pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ nadikuda sa kapańßaj a nutudu Ē~ ° sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa najaj kur~…ĺusa sapi tima Ē~ ° ¶u…ôd…ôtaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu kisu u ¶a ¶anan adińßan mańßida ubudawan mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj a ¶a ¶aj ¶aj kaw ni par~…ĺawp…ôs kujni usadawmiaj a ¶a ¶aj nu amiku tusaaj a kitakit ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nika ¶a ¶aj kaku kapar~…ĺawp…ôs najnaji ku sapar~…ĺawp…ôs adidia ¶a najnaji ku sapar~…ĺawp…ôs namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natid…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == makatapal hakya tu nabalucu'an. matineng hakiya tu nadipaan nu misu,akay namakatengi tu hakiya kuheni tina kungku, makatapal hakiya tu nabalucu'an. . nu amilika asulit kuyni isasaay. lt's a human sign , When things go wrong When the scent of her lingers , And temptation's strong , lnto the boundary , Of each married man Sweet drceit comes calling , And negativity lands Cold cold heart , Hard done by you Some things look bettet baby , just asimple word lt's two hearts living , ln tow separate worlds But it's no sacrifice , no sacrifice lt's no sacrifice at all , Mutual misunderstanding After the fact , Welose direction No stone untumed , No tears to damn you Cold cold heart , Hard done by you Some things look better baby , Just passin' through And it's no sacrifice , Just a simple wort it's two separate worlds , But, lt'd no sacrifice No sacrifice, at all , No sacrifice at sll nilaculan Sakidaya a kamu u bacu nu tademaw kuyni. yu patelac ku kawaw sa. yu masaliyut ku bangisi sa icelang ku saala micumud tu tapiingan usiacaway tu naming a tatama sicedamay a sapiyala iniw tu makudi'ay a lala sacueded sa kubalucu'' mangelu' tu kisu haw ucacanan adihan mahida ubudawan madayumay a sasakamuen tusaay a balucu' maudip henay tusaay a kitakit caay kalecad cay kaw ni palawpes kuyni inayay ku nipalawpes naynayi kuni palawpes masasu patelac nadikuda sa kapahay a nutudu' saicelang sa nayay kulusa sapi tima' cuedetay a balucu' mangelu' tu kisu ucacanan adihan mahida ubudawan micaliway acacay cay kaw ni palawpes kuyni usadawmiay a cacay nu amiku tusaay a kitakit caay kalecad nika cacay kaku kapalawpes naynayi ku sapalawpes adidiaca naynayi ku sapalawpes namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natidengan
